languages.text: "Понятия не имею, о ком вы. Если вы разыскиваете свою родственницу из числа бойцов, рекомендую обратиться к одному из полевых командиров". {n}Наследница слегка растягивает слова, отгораживаясь от неудобных вопросов все той же непроницаемой вежливостью.{/n}

"I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Понятия не имею, о ком вы. Если вы разыскиваете свою родственницу из числа бойцов, рекомендую обратиться к одному из полевых командиров". {n}Наследница слегка растягивает слова, отгораживаясь от неудобных вопросов все той же непроницаемой вежливостью.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

"I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

"I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

languages.text: «No tengo ni la menor idea de a quién se refiere. Si busca a una familiar entre los soldados, sugiero que se dirija a uno de los comandantes de campo». {n}La heredera von Valancius responde arrastrando ligeramente las palabras, rechazando la pregunta incómoda con una cortesía impenetrable.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No tengo ni la menor idea de a quién se refiere. Si busca a una familiar entre los soldados, sugiero que se dirija a uno de los comandantes de campo». {n}La heredera von Valancius responde arrastrando ligeramente las palabras, rechazando la pregunta incómoda con una cortesía impenetrable.{/n}

languages.text: “我不知道你在说谁。若你想在战士中寻找你的亲人，我建议你去问问战地指挥官。”{n}这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人微微拖长了声调，依旧用滴水不漏的礼节回避着这些尴尬的问题。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我不知道你在说谁。若你想在战士中寻找你的亲人，我建议你去问问战地指挥官。”{n}这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人微微拖长了声调，依旧用滴水不漏的礼节回避着这些尴尬的问题。{/n}

languages.text: « Jamais entendu parler. Si vous cherchez une parente parmi les combattants, je vous suggère d'en parler à l'un des commandants sur le terrain. » {n}L'héritière des von Valancius vous répond d'une voix traînante, éludant les questions gênantes avec la courtoisie impénétrable qui lui est coutumière.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Jamais entendu parler. Si vous cherchez une parente parmi les combattants, je vous suggère d'en parler à l'un des commandants sur le terrain. » {n}L'héritière des von Valancius vous répond d'une voix traînante, éludant les questions gênantes avec la courtoisie impénétrable qui lui est coutumière.{/n}

languages.text: "Kimi kastettiğiniz hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok. Savaşçılar arasında bir akrabanızı arıyorsanız saha komutanlarından birine başvurmanızı öneririm." {n}Von Valancius vârisi; hafif yayvan bir sesle, garip soruları aynı aşılmaz nezaketle savuşturarak cevap veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kimi kastettiğiniz hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok. Savaşçılar arasında bir akrabanızı arıyorsanız saha komutanlarından birine başvurmanızı öneririm." {n}Von Valancius vârisi; hafif yayvan bir sesle, garip soruları aynı aşılmaz nezaketle savuşturarak cevap veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich habe keine Ahnung, wen Ihr meint. Falls Ihr unter den Kämpfern einen Verwandten von Euch sucht, solltet Ihr Euch an einen der Feldkommandeure wenden", {n}erwidert die Erbin des Hauses von Valancius affektiert, um die heikle Frage mit derselben undurchdringlichen Höflichkeit abzutun.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe keine Ahnung, wen Ihr meint. Falls Ihr unter den Kämpfern einen Verwandten von Euch sucht, solltet Ihr Euch an einen der Feldkommandeure wenden", {n}erwidert die Erbin des Hauses von Valancius affektiert, um die heikle Frage mit derselben undurchdringlichen Höflichkeit abzutun.{/n}

languages.text: 「誰のことか全くわかりません。もしあなたが戦闘員の中にあなたの親戚を探しているのなら、司令官の一人に訴えかけることをお勧めします」{n}、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の相続人は少しの口調で答える。不躾な質問を、同じように不屈の礼儀でかわす。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have no idea whom you mean. If you are seeking a relative of yours among the fighters, I suggest you appeal to one of the field commanders," {n}the von Valancius heir responds in a slight drawl, fending off awkward questions with the same impenetrable courtesy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「誰のことか全くわかりません。もしあなたが戦闘員の中にあなたの親戚を探しているのなら、司令官の一人に訴えかけることをお勧めします」{n}、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の相続人は少しの口調で答える。不躾な質問を、同じように不屈の礼儀でかわす。{/n}
